title: New Glenn rocket explodes on Cape Canaveral pad
summary:

title: How NASA Uses Light to Detect Waste From Mines
summary: Tens of thousands of abandoned mines threaten waterways across the American West, but identifying which sites urgently need cleanup is slow and expensive.
